sourceTitle: AI Detection Software Guidance - Office of the Executive Vice President and Provost
evidenceSnippetOriginal: The University prohibits the use of all third-party software, including AI Detection Software ... to evaluate student work or assignments unless a University contract or purchase order is in place.
evidenceLocator: Use of AI Detection Software Requires a University Contract or Purchase Order
